item.title: Scores for 2026-06-01
item.description: Pot limit Omaha Hi-Lo Place User Points 1 Maryjean 12,000 2 Norma1 10,000 3 bill 8,000 4 PaPaLarry 6,000 5 Nana_Sharon 4,000 6 Kevin 2,000 No limit Omaha Hi-Lo Place User Points 1 Norma1 12,000 2 Maryjean 10,000 3 Nana_Sharon 8,000 4 PaPaLarry 6,000 6 bill 2,000 Month Point Totals Place User Points 1t Maryjean 22,000 1t Norma1 22,000 3t Nana_Sharon 12,000 3t PaPaLarry 12,000 5 bill 10,000 6 Kevin 2,000
